en: informal and formal words, wrong vs. incorrect, tough vs. difficult, whole vs. entire,.
ko: 비격식 단어와 격식 단어. wrong vs. incorrect, tough vs. difficult, whole vs. entire,
ja: 非公式と公式の単語、wrong vs incorrect、tough vs difficult。
vi: Tu khong chinh thuc va chinh thuc, wrong doi incorrect, tough doi difficult, whole doi entire.

en: Cheap vs. inexpensive, better vs. superior, lucky vs. fortunate, hopeless vs. futile,.
ko: cheap vs. inexpensive, better vs. superior, lucky vs. fortunate, hopeless vs. futile,
ja: cheap vs inexpensive、better vs superior、lucky vs fortunate。
vi: Cheap doi inexpensive, better doi superior, lucky doi fortunate, hopeless doi futile.

en: Smart vs. intelligent, enough vs. sufficient. Please subscribe, like and share.
ko: smart vs. intelligent, enough vs. sufficient. 구독, 좋아요, 공유 부탁드립니다.
ja: smart vs intelligent、enough vs sufficient。いいね、シェアして。
vi: Smart doi intelligent, enough doi sufficient. Hay dang ky, thich va chia se.
